# MHSAA: CAP Requirement - FALL Coaches

**1 message** on 2026-05-11

## 1. 2026-05-11 14:24 — kiersten@mhsaa.com

May 11, 2026

Dear Joel Dohm - Petoskey HS,

Each head coach of a varsity team in an MHSAA tournament sport hired for the first time as a high school varsity head coach at any MHSAA member high school (after July 31, 2016) is required to complete either Level 1 or Level 2 of the MHSAA Coaches Advancement Program (CAP). If the head coach does not complete CAP Level 1 or 2 prior to the established deadline, that coach will be prohibited from coaching in that season's MHSAA tournament for the sport involved.  (MHSAA Handbook Regulation II, Section 3).

According to the information received, you have hired Jason Younker as the Boys Soccer head varsity coach. Jason has not completed either Level 1 or Level 2 of the MHSAA Coaches Advancement Program. The coach also appears not to be registered for an upcoming course or is registered for a course that will not meet the deadline. We urge coaches to register for classes as soon as possible, as classes may be cancelled due to low registration. We are sending these notices out with a vast amount of time to complete this requirement for coaches' convenience.

The deadline for completion of this coursework for Fall Coaches is Thursday, September 10, 2026.  There are plenty of opportunities to take the CAP coursework prior to the deadline.  CAP is a great program of education for all MHSAA coaches, so you may also wish to have all or other coaches on your staff register for one or more programs.

Below is the link for CAP courses that are currently offered.
CAP Schedule/Registration<https://link.edgepilot.com/s/7c549028/L_xnZaSVb0WP4Vp9RV1eXw?u=https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30936621/my.mhsaa.com?>

Additionally, if there is a date and time that you wish to offer CAP clinics at your school, please feel free to contact the MHSAA.

Please feel free to contact Kiersten or me at 517-332-5046 if you have any additional questions or think our information is incorrect. Thank you.

Best regards,

Sent by Kiersten Anstead on behalf of:

[[Kathy Cooper|Kathy]] Vruggink Westdorp
Senior Assistant Director
Michigan High School Athletic Association
